subcodes.first_line: O kindled flame! Should thy blaze be transient, thy radiance would last but a breath, and thy gathering-place become a niche of sorrow through thy kindling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع افروخته اگر شعله فانی زنی روشناایت دمیست و محفلت مشکاه پرغمی افروختنت
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @power of prayer, @the concourse on high, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
